response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate with a unique and highly relevant skill set. His experience as the founder of GISCollective, an open-source geospatial data platform, aligns perfectly with the job's domain. While his professional C++ experience is not recent, his extensive work with DLang in high-performance, low-latency environments is an excellent proxy, suggesting he can quickly master modern C++. His background in distributed systems and data integration further strengthens his fit for designing and operating a critical routing data pipeline.
strengths: Direct, hands-on experience building a geospatial data platform (GISCollective).
Proven experience with low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems in a data integration context.
Strong systems programming background with DLang and C++, indicating a solid foundation for the required tech stack.
concerns: Primary C++ development experience is not recent, dating back to 2015.
No explicit experience mentioned with the transformation of map data into optimized routing tiles.
Most recent roles have been full-stack focused on TypeScript/Node.js, which is a departure from the core C++/systems focus of this role.
